title: Heavenly Dreams Knowledge Hub
description: Organizational knowledge governance contract. AI agents may only use approved, versioned knowledge.

ragGovernance.citationRequired: Agent answers must cite documentIds used
ragGovernance.sourceAuthority: HD-CORE defines which sources enter the index

rules.agentConstraint: AI agents only consume documents with status=approved and aiUsageAllowed=true.
rules.templateConstraint: CRM_AGENT and RH_AGENT drafts must be based on approved templates only.
rules.versioning: Every change produces a new version via PR.
